changes: Resolved an issue wherein the PvE action Unleash did not consume stacks of Blood Weapon despite still restoring MP.
Confiteor: Healing potency of Sacred Claim effect has been increased from 2,000 to 3,000.
Blade of Faith: Healing potency of Sacred Claim effect has been increased from 2,000 to 3,000.
Blade of Truth: Healing potency of Sacred Claim effect has been increased from 2,000 to 3,000.
Blade of Valor: Healing potency of Sacred Claim effect has been increased from 2,000 to 3,000.
Doton: Potency has been increased from 2,000 to 3,000.
Hollow Nozuchi: Potency has been increased from 2,000 to 3,000.
Seiton Tenchu: Potency has been increased from 10,000 to 12,000.
Pneuma: Barrier potency has been increased from 2,000 to 3,000.
Pneuma: Stacks of Haimatinon granted have been reduced from 5 to 4.
Eukrasian Dosis III: Damage over time duration has been increased from 12 to 15 seconds.

new_content.name: Aloalo Island
new_content.description: A variant dungeon where players explore winding paths to uncover mysteries. Supports solo or party play for up to four players with difficulty scaling.

new_content.name: Another Aloalo Island
new_content.description: A criterion dungeon requiring a party of four players with set role composition.

new_content.name: Another Aloalo Island (Savage)
new_content.description: A savage-level criterion dungeon for a pre-formed party of four players.

new_content.name: Blunderville
new_content.description: A battle royale mode collaboration with Fall Guys where up to 24 players compete in three stages of obstacle courses.

new_content.name: Splendorous Tools enhancement quest series
new_content.description: A continuation of the quest series to enhance tools for Disciples of the Hand and Land.

new_content.name: Dance Like Mowen Is Watching
new_content.description: Quest required to continue the Splendorous Tools enhancement.

new_content.name: Stranger from Paradise
new_content.description: Quest required to unlock the Aloalo Island variant dungeon.

new_content.name: Just Crowning Around
new_content.description: Quest required to unlock access to Blunderville.

new_content.name: V&C Dungeon Finder
new_content.description: A new system under Duty used to register for variant and criterion dungeons.

new_content.name: Variant Actions
new_content.description: Special abilities granted in variant dungeons to allow for greater freedom of role choices.

new_content.name: Red Sands
new_content.description: A new arena for the Crystalline Conflict PvP mode.

housing.name: South Seas Coelacanth Display
housing.description: Proudly boast of this beautiful fish to your closest friends, or whomever else will forgive you for forcing them to admire a hanging fish.

housing.name: Sagely Sparrow Statue
housing.description: This replica of the avian figures enshrined on Aloalo Island is rather reminiscent of someone you know...

housing.name: Aloalo Island Palm
housing.description: This tree was imported from the balmy climes of Aloalo Island to brighten your abode with tropical whimsy. Pay no heed to the leaves it drops in homesickness.

housing.name: Aloalo Roselle Hedge
housing.description: Beautiful blooms of the south sea isles curated into a garden-friendly shrubbery.

housing.name: Aloalo Faerie Cushion
housing.description: A rude surprise awaits all those who dare plant their buttocks upon the image of Aloalo Island's most mischievous faerie.

housing.name: Forgotten Figure
housing.description: A stunning replica of a statue once lost to the ages─but no longer.

housing.name: Aloalo Pendant Wall Lamp
housing.description: The design of this wall-mounted light was inspired by similar relics discovered on Aloalo Island.

glamour.name: Statice's Wings
glamour.description: Use to acquire a pair of Statice's wings.

glamour.name: Giant Leaf Parasol
glamour.description: Use to acquire a giant leaf parasol.
